title: Airy Optimized
description: This modpack includes optimization mods that help with both gameplay and map-building, ensuring you get the best performance
body:
# Airy Optimized ### Stay tuned updates incoming! Check it the [GitHub](https://github.com/cardosogpr/airyoptimized) ## About This modpack is built to **_enhance your gameplay experience_** while providing the _**best possible performance**_ for your worlds. It includes _**quality-of-life mods**_ like Lightweight Inventory and Litematica to help with your progression and building. If you only want the mods folder, you can get it from our GitHub releases: https://github.com/cardosogpr/airyoptimized/releases If you find any bugs or feature requests submit on out GitHub issues page: https://github.com/cardosogpr/airyoptimized/issues ## List of Mods
Inclued mods (3?)
  • Animatica by FoundationGames
  • AppleSkin by squeek502
  • Architectury by shedaniel
  • Better Statistics Screen by TheCSDev
  • BetterF3 by cominixo, TreyRuffy
  • Boxlib by Boxadactle
  • Capes by Cael
  • Cherished Worlds by Illusive Soulworks
  • Cloth Config v19 by shedaniel
  • Clumps by Jared
  • Day Count by Intijir, original creator, MC Mods Pete, mcmods.pete@gmail.com
  • DebugKeybind by Boxadactle
  • Debugify by isXander
  • Dynamic FPS by juliand665, LostLuma
  • Entity Model Features by Traben
  • Entity Texture Features by Traben
  • EntityCulling by tr7zw
  • Fabric API by FabricMC
  • Fabric Language Kotlin by FabricMC
  • Falling Leaves by Fourmisain, BrekiTomasson, RandomMcSomethin
  • FerriteCore by malte0811
  • ImmediatelyFast by RK_01
  • Iris by coderbot, IMS212, Justsnoopy30, FoundationGames
  • Language Reload by Jerozgen
  • Lightweight Inventory Sorting by BorknBeans
  • Lighty by andi_makes
  • Litematica by masa
  • Litematica Printer by aleksilassila
  • Lithium by JellySquid, 2No2Name
  • MaLiLib by masa
  • Mod Menu by Prospector, haykam821, TerraformersMC
  • More Culling by FX - PR0CESS, 1Foxy2
  • Mouse Tweaks by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)
  • No Chat Reports by Aizistral
  • OptiGUI by opekope2
  • Placeholder API by Patbox
  • Reese's Sodium Options by FlashyReese
  • Shulker Box Tooltip by MisterPeModder
  • Sodium by JellySquid (jellysquid3)
  • Sodium Extra by FlashyReese
  • TCDCommons API by TheCSDev
  • Xaero's World Map by xaero96
  • YetAnotherConfigLib by isXander
  • Zoomify by isXander
  • spark by Luck
---
Other notes ### Versions The versions format is 0.x.y, where - the x is the MC Version taken, this value increases when MC updates. - the y indicates changes to the mod list, including additions, removals, and general updates. - Sometimes, there are 'alpha' and 'beta' versions. These are experimental and may contain bugs.
